text.title: Monolith Architecture Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Team 6 engineers, e-commerce MVP. Step 1 passes. Step 2 → vertical-slice (multiple feature teams). Step 3 ships GitHub Actions pipeline. Step 4 wraps order-creation in a single transaction (no saga). Step 5 budgets scale-up to 8 vCPU / 16 GB. Step 6 records 'extract checkout when independent scaling > 10× rest'. Spec ready.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
